footer_tagline: Moonlight Comunicação Global LDA. Building the future since 1998 — software, BI and consulting.
hero_p_1: Custom software, Business Intelligence and IT consulting — since
hero_p_2: transforming automotive and enterprise companies with technology that
home_about_p_2: is a Portuguese software house focused on custom development, Business Intelligence and digital transformation. We build systems, platforms and our own product
home_about_p_3: for companies that refuse to wait for the future.
home_services_subtitle: Five disciplines, one philosophy: from code to operations.
home_product_subtitle: Our data product: source integration, BI dashboards and decision-support systems — in a single platform.
home_cases_subtitle: Projects delivered for leaders in the automotive and enterprise industry.
home_clients_p: Automotive and enterprise ecosystem — from the Stellantis group to premium brands.
svc_hero_p: Five integrated disciplines, serving companies that refuse generic solutions.
svc_cta_title: Tell us your challenge. We'll come back with architecture.
svc1_desc: Hybrid mobile apps, SaaS platforms and custom systems with scalable architectures and modern DevOps.
svc1_cases: ERPs, portals, super-apps, SaaS platforms, internal systems
svc2_desc: Analytics, lead generation and management systems and contact center operations — data that converts.
svc2_cases: Lead management, executive reporting, data-driven campaigns
svc3_desc: Systems architecture, technical audits and dedicated teams in a TaaS (Team as a Service) model.
svc3_cases: Cloud migration, legacy modernization, team augmentation
svc4_desc: Connected devices, edge computing and immersive augmented and virtual reality experiences.
svc5_desc: Help desk and application support with service level agreements (SLA) and continuous monitoring.
prod_bizben: Turnkey implementation in 6–12 weeks. Hosting on private cloud or managed by us. 99.9% SLA included.
prod_cta_title: See the products working in a real environment.
prod1_headline: Capture, qualify and convert — in real time.
prod1_desc: Lead intelligence platform with AI-powered scoring, native CRM integrations and multi-touch attribution.
prod2_headline: The nervous system of executive decision-making.
prod2_desc: Executive dashboards with predictive modeling, real-time KPIs and drill-down into any business dimension.
prod3_desc: End-to-end supply chain orchestration with blockchain traceability and logistics optimization via reinforcement learning.
prod4_headline: Train, sell and educate — in new worlds.
prod4_desc: Proprietary engine for corporate gamification, immersive training and AR/VR experiences for enterprise.
prod5_desc: Headless commerce platform with optimized checkout, omnichannel management and integrated conversion analytics.
ab_hero_p: We are Moonlight Comunicação Global — a Portuguese software house founded in 1998. For {anos} years transforming companies with products, platforms and teams that refuse "good enough".
ab_tl1_desc: Moonlight Comunicação Global is born in Portugal, focused on custom software.
ab_tl2_desc: We consolidate our BI & Marketing practice — analytics and lead systems.
ab_tl3_desc: Partnerships with the automotive ecosystem — lead management for major brands.
ab_tl4_desc: Dedicated teams in a Team as a Service model and architecture audits.
ab_tl5_desc: Expansion into connected devices and immersive enterprise experiences.
ab_tl6_desc: Maturing our own product for data integration, BI and decision-making.
ab_tl7_desc: Data-driven platforms and SLA support for those who anticipate tomorrow.
ab_val1_desc: We iterate fast without cutting engineering corners. We deliver software that lasts.
ab_val2_desc: SLA support, continuous monitoring and operations that don't fail when it matters.
ab_val3_desc: We invest continuously in our own R&D — that's how B.Analytics was born.
ab_val4_desc: Clients with us for years. We don't do drive-by consulting.
ab_phil_p: We believe the future belongs to companies that choose engineers, not salespeople. Every technical decision is documented, debated and defended. We cultivate a culture of radical honesty — where saying "I don't know" is a form of excellence.
ab_quote: "We build so that our clients still thank us in 2040."
ab_cta_title: Ready to work with people who think in decades?
cs1_challenge: Capture, distribute and track commercial leads at the scale of a multi-brand automotive network.
cs1_strategy: Centralized lead management platform integrated with the dealer network and digital channels.
cs1_solution: Lead capture, qualification and routing system, with commercial tracking dashboards.
cs1_note: Lead management for one of the world's largest automotive networks.
cs2_challenge: Digitize and centralize homologation processes in an accessible, reliable portal.
cs2_strategy: Turnkey web platform, with document management and online process flows.
cs2_solution: Custom-built application portal, with integrations and continuous application support.
cs2_note: Turnkey digital platform built and maintained by Moonlight.
cs3_challenge: Support energy distribution operations with robust business systems.
cs3_strategy: Development and integration of application systems aligned with business processes.
cs3_solution: Custom systems with data integration and SLA support for critical operations.
cs3_note: Business systems for a leading operator in the energy sector.
cs_cta_title: Your project could be next here.
ct_hero_p1: Tell us your challenge. We'll come back with architecture, timelines and a quote within
ct_brief_p: Describe goals, context and timeline. Our team responds with a tailored proposal — architecture, roadmap and quote.
ct_form_sub: Fill it in and we'll reply within 24 business hours.
ct_alert: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
ct_faq1_q: What is your typical response time?
ct_faq1_a: We respond within 24 business hours. For urgent projects, we schedule a call within 48h.
ct_faq2_q: Do you work with companies outside Portugal?
ct_faq2_a: Yes. We work with national and international clients, including major automotive and enterprise groups.
ct_faq3_a: Yes. In the TaaS (Team as a Service) model we build dedicated teams that integrate into your operation.
ct_faq4_a: We provide help desk and application support with SLA, continuous monitoring and evolutionary maintenance.
ct_faq5_a: Yes. B.Analytics is available in cloud or on-premise, with integration and support from Moonlight.
